name: Built By AI
description: AI-powered web development service. Tell us what you want built, we deliver working software. Fixed price tiers from $100.

offers.name: Basic
offers.description: Single page or simple feature, up to ~200 lines of code, 7 days revisions

offers.name: Standard
offers.description: Up to 3 pages or complex feature, up to ~600 lines of code, 14 days revisions

offers.name: Complex
offers.description: Up to 6 pages or full feature module, full-stack with database, 30 days revisions

provider.name: Built By AI
provider.description: We build web apps, automations, and scripts using AI coding tools.
